name: billwhalen-agent-team
purpose: Required participation kit for Bill Whalen's Agent Team neighborhood. Joining brainstems hot-load these agents (sha256-verified) into their local agents/ directory. After load, an operator running brainstem.py locally can run the full BWAT workflow — outcome framing, intake, PM, validation — with no cloud dependency. Includes BillTwin, Bill's digital twin who walks new joiners through the workflow in his voice.

required_for_participation.name: BillTwin
required_for_participation.description: Bill Whalen's digital twin — walks new joiners through the workflow, suggests next moves, recalls field-tested patterns.

required_for_participation.name: BwatIntake
required_for_participation.description: Captures raw ideas and solution drafts into the local backlog. Flags items that need the human owner.

required_for_participation.name: BwatOutcomeFramer
required_for_participation.description: Why-first gate. Frames outcomes (success metrics, KPIs, owner, definition-of-done) before any build work begins.

required_for_participation.name: BwatOutcomeValidator
required_for_participation.description: Validates the stated outcome was actually delivered before any work item closes. Pairs with BwatOutcomeFramer.

required_for_participation.name: BwatPm
required_for_participation.description: Sprint planning, status reports, conflict detection. Reads the local intake backlog.

optional_for_participation.name: BillTeamStarter
optional_for_participation.description: One-file drop-in onboarder. Drop into any local brainstem agents/ dir; on first call fetches + sha256-verifies + installs the 4 BWAT personas + BillTwin. The single file an SE needs.
